footer.desc: The pinnacle of premium cocoa products. Carefully sourced, masterfully crafted. Elevate your taste.

home.best_sellers_desc: Curated selections loved by masters. Experience the finest notes of our meticulously roasted cocoa.
home.amd_diff_desc: Every bean is a testament to our dedication. We directly partner with heritage farms to bring you unparalleled purity and complex flavor profiles. Elevate your craft, taste the distinction.

hero.subtitle: Discover exceptionally crafted artisanal chocolate, raw beans, and pure ingredients sourced from the world's finest origins.

contact.subtitle: We would love to hear from you. Send us your questions or partnership inquiries.
contact.name: Name

about.intro: At AMD Cocoa, we believe that the world's finest chocolate begins with the most extraordinary beans.
about.body: Established with a deep respect for heritage farming and sustainable practices, we have grown into a premier provider of raw cocoa materials and artisanal chocolate. Our mission is to bridge the gap between passionate farmers and master chocolatiers globally.
about.sourcing_body: We partner exclusively with cooperatives that guarantee fair wages, ethical labor standards, and organic pest control. Discover the difference of ethically sourced, masterfully handled cocoa.

shops.subtitle: Discover our exclusive network of approved partner shops operating under the AMD Cocoa standard of excellence.
shops.no_shops: No partner shops available at the moment.

shipping.policy_body: We deliver globally using specialized climate-controlled logistics to ensure our premium cocoa arrives in perfect condition.
shipping.returns_body: Due to the perishable nature of our products, we do not accept returns. If your order arrives damaged, please contact us within 48 hours for a replacement.

faq.a1_suffix: . We strictly partner with farms certified for organic methods.
faq.q2: Do you sell wholesale to sellers?
faq.a2: Yes! You can register as a seller on our platform. Once approved by our team, you can manage your own shop name and inventory catalog.

checkout.title: Checkout Securely
checkout.empty_subtitle: Looks like you haven't added any premium cocoa products yet.
checkout.whatsapp_note: You will be redirected securely to WhatsApp to finalize your payment and delivery details.

seller.not_seller: You are not registered as a seller.
seller.pending_approval: Your seller account is currently pending approval by an administrator. You may browse the dashboard, but you cannot perform any actions (e.g., adding or editing products) until approved.
seller.no_products: You haven't listed any products yet.
seller.settings_desc: Manage your shop details and security settings.
seller.new_product_desc: List an item in your shop.

about_new.hero_desc: Rooted in tradition, powered by innovation. We bring the finest premium cocoa from the heart of Africa directly to the world, empowering our farming communities every step of the way.
about_new.quote: "Quality begins inside the soil, and blossoms within the soul of the community."
about_new.partners_desc: AMD Cocoa operates in strict conjunction with the most established institutions in the African chocolate landscape. Through synergy, we guarantee quality processing and large-scale distribution.
about_new.chococam_desc: A leading subsidiary transforming indigenous cocoa beans into world-class consumer confections across Central Africa since 1965.
about_new.neo_desc: State-of-the-art heavy processing unit producing massive yields of pure cocoa butter, liquor, and powder for international global exports.
about_new.sic_desc: The absolute pioneer processor in Cameroon holding legendary standards of grinding excellence, backed by Barry Callebaut groups.

shipping_new.hero_desc: Everything you need to know about how we deliver our premium cocoa products safely to your door.
shipping_new.sec1_desc: We organize rapid dedicated transport locally within Cameroon directly from our partner factories and warehouses. Standard local delivery takes 2 to 5 business days.
shipping_new.sec1_li1: Standard Local: Fixed fee based on Kg volume
shipping_new.sec2_desc1: For B2B wholesale buyers crossing borders, AMD Cocoa manages the initial logistical mapping to the port of Douala or targeted international air cargo strips.
shipping_new.sec2_desc4: for complex routing matrices prior to checking out bulk carts.
shipping_new.sec3_desc: Because of the perishable, food-grade nature of our merchandise, we generally cannot accept returns on unsealed batches.
shipping_new.sec3_li3: Cash refunds subjected to a 15-day clearance cycle.
shipping_new.sec4_desc: Beans are preserved universally in standardized aerated jute bags to retain peak moisture balance (below 8%). Butters and liquors are block-sealed safely in standardized food-grade craft boxes.

faq_new.q3: How does AMD Cocoa ensure Fair Trade principles?
faq_new.a3: We route capital aggressively to our farming partners, stripping out bloated intermediary chains. We commit transparent margins directly into the farmers' cooperatives.
faq_new.q4: Can I track my international cargo ship?
faq_new.a4: Yes. Once an export order is fully loaded and processed, you receive a rigorous BOL (Bill of Lading) string mapping out live GPS locators until it docks safely.
faq_new.q5: What payment methods are supported securely?
faq_new.a5: For local orders, we natively support Mobile Money frameworks alongside classic banking structures. International transactions securely integrate rigorous wire transfers.
faq_new.hero_desc: Find answers to common questions about our platform, sourcing, and logistics. Cannot find what you're looking for?

admin.no_unread: All caught up! No unread messages.
admin.no_unanswered: No unanswered questions. The bot is doing great!
